div.h3: Why Thread-ID Keying Can Overwrite Start Timestamps

ol.li: Same Thread ID: Both syscalls execute on thread 1234
BPF_ANY flag: bpf_map_update_elem(..., BPF_ANY) overwrites existing entry
No nesting detection: Entry probe doesn't check if entry already exists

ul.li: Most syscalls don't invoke other syscalls
VFS layer usually uses internal functions, not syscall entry points
Kernel paths are optimized to avoid recursion
Hash map was full at entry time Typical value: <0.01% of events
